query: I'm about to let an AI agent edit my repo, how do I protect the history
tag a restore point before this coding session in case it goes wrong
the agent wants to rebase and force-push, is that safe
before I report the repo state, how do I verify it's actually committed
set up a guard so force-pushes are blocked in this repo
make sure I can undo an entire agent session in one command
apply this patch to the file with a backup
verify the auditor's finding before changing code
